title: Africa Map Reference Source Packet
summary: Africa map work needs a dedicated lane because continent-level orientation can hide major subregional differences. Products should separate command-area framing, AU/UN multilateral context, national issuer perspectives, geographic-name questions, and historical/archival maps.

title: Arctic And High North Map Reference Source Packet
summary: Arctic map use should stay split into five lanes: static orientation, command-area framing, nautical/ocean source routing, issuer-perspective national maps, and multilateral or research context. No single public map should be treated as proof of access, mobility, infrastructure…

title: Denmark Arctic And North Atlantic Implementation Source Packet
summary: Denmark's Arctic and North Atlantic lane now needs implementation evidence, not another baseline. The Danish Defence Agreement and ministry Arctic pages provide the policy spine, but delivery claims require dated evidence from budgets, parliamentary records, acquisition agencies…

title: All-Topic Current Source Sweep Tracker

title: China/PLA Source Collection Tracker
summary: Track China and PLA source-family collection across official U.S., PRC issuer, Taiwan, allied/regional, cyber, legal, map, industrial, technology, and WARLOCK-INDEX derived products.

title: Cyber And Space Refresh Queue Tracker
summary: Tracker update covering Global cyber / space.

title: Defensive Cyber Source Lane Packet
summary: WARLOCK-INDEX should treat defensive cyber as a standing source lane rather than a one-off topic. The highest-value structure is a recurring watch that links official advisories, vulnerability metadata, vendor mitigations, sector context, and caveats into a searchable corpus.

title: Critical Materials And Defense Supply Chain Source Packet
summary: Critical materials and supply chains are now a defense-industrial lane, not a background economics topic. Munitions, energetics, missiles, shipbuilding, submarines, batteries, sensors, satellites, radar, secure communications, microelectronics, drones, counter-UAS systems, and c…

title: Maritime AIS Map Handling

title: Middle East Maritime Chokepoint Map Reference Source Packet
summary: Middle East maritime map work should support static chokepoint orientation and source routing, not live maritime analysis. Hormuz, Bab el-Mandeb, the Red Sea, Suez, and Eastern Mediterranean lanes require strong separation between map orientation, nautical chart source provenanc…

title: Arms-Control Erosion Strategic Tracker

title: Iran WMD And Missile-Relevance Source Packet

title: EU Readiness 2030 Implementation Source Packet
summary: Readiness 2030 should be treated as an EU implementation architecture, not as proof that European forces are ready or that member states have delivered specific capability. The useful source separation is: policy frame Readiness 2030, financing instrument SAFE, industrial-progra…

title: NATO Europe Force Presence Implementation Tracker
summary: The 2026-06-18 remarks are a review signal, not a completed force-posture decision. WARLOCK-INDEX should now track the review as an implementation question: what did the Department of War formally say, what review terms are issued, what NATO or allied governments say in response…
